steps.label: cause
steps.text: Viable spoilage yeasts or bacteria may remain in wine before bottling.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Sterile-grade membrane filtration physically removes microorganisms immediately before the wine enters clean bottles.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The risk of Brettanomyces growth, refermentation, haze, gas, and microbial off-flavours in bottle is reduced.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The risk of Brettanomyces growth, refermentation, haze, gas, and microbial off-flavours in bottle is reduced.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
